examples: Sulphur dioxide is a pollutant and a major contributor to acid rain.
Nitrogen dioxide is a pollutant emitted by automobiles.
Sulfur dioxide, a major contributor to acid rain, is an especially serious pollutant because it diminishes the respiratory system's ability to deal with all other pollutants.
In other words, instead of regulating the sediment directly, EPA decided that water was a pollutant.
The first question facing the justices is whether carbon dioxide is a pollutant at all.
